title: Fix section title and badge count — 'Active Positions' confusion
objective: The 'Active Positions' section title and its badge count (2) contradict the command bar 'Open: 0'. The badge counts all unified positions (open + shadow + resolved), while cmd-open only counts truly open bot positions. Users see two different numbers for what appears to be the same concept. Fix both.
status: QUEUED — DO NOT START. Wait for REVIEW_DASH_009.md Decision: APPROVED before executing.
queued_reason: Same file as DASH_009 — activate only after DASH_009 is APPROVED

context.symptom: Command bar shows 'Open: 0' but 'Active Positions' badge shows '2'. Both are technically correct but count different things: cmd-open reads state.json open_positions (live bot state), pos-count reads unified.length (open + shadow + recently resolved). Side-by-side, they contradict each other.

deliverables.label: Fix B — badge counts only live positions

acceptance_criteria: When there are 0 open trades and 0 shadow positions but 2 resolved trades showing, badge reads '0' not '2'
Badge increments correctly when a live open position exists
cmd-open and pos-count badge now agree when there are no shadow-only positions
Resolved position cards still render — they are not hidden, just not counted in the badge
verification: Reload dashboard. Section title should read 'Positions'.
With current state (0 open, 2 resolved), badge should show '0'.
Resolved cards should still be visible below.
